description: Log in to Odoo (admin/admin). As Lumiere A/V Rentals, fulfill equipment requests for 'Starlight Productions' and 'Acme Corp' based on the dispatch and return instructions found in their contact records. For Starlight Productions, create an internal transfer from 'WH/Stock' to 'WH/Out on Rent' for the specific items and serial numbers requested. For Acme Corp, process their return from 'WH/Out on Rent', routing intact items to 'WH/Stock' and damaged items to 'WH/Maintenance'. Do not move any equipment belonging to other clients, such as the Sony Venice camera.

natural_language.prompt: Review the internal notes for our customers 'Starlight Productions' and 'Acme Corp' in the Contacts app to find their dispatch and return instructions. Create the necessary Internal Transfers to fulfill these requests. For Starlight's dispatch, transfer the exact items and precise serial numbers requested from 'WH/Stock' to 'WH/Out on Rent'. For Acme's return, transfer the items from 'WH/Out on Rent' back to the company, ensuring you route intact items to 'WH/Stock' and the damaged item explicitly to 'WH/Maintenance'. Do not touch or move any other rental equipment that belongs to other clients.
